prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with high carbohydrate intake and proper fueling around a 90-minute morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus pre/during/post-workout nutrition
Total daily carbohydrates are 8-10g per kg of body weight (544-680g)
Pre-run meal is 2-3 hours before exercise; post-run meal contains carbs and protein within 30-60 minutes
Plan is compact and fits on a single page
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and power gains with optimal protein distribution for muscle recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals
Protein distributed across meals (minimum 25g per meal for recovery optimization)
Includes pre/post-workout nutrition timing for strength athlete
Caloric intake appropriate for 95kg strength athlete in surplus
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing elevated protein distribution and recovery-focused meals with varying caloric demands

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain weight class for competition while optimizing performance and recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and covers one full day with 3+ meals
Total daily calories and macronutrient targets are specified and appropriate for weight maintenance in a 70kg athlete
Includes hydration guidelines aligned with athletic performance needs
All meals respect vegetarian and dairy-free restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a weight-class constrained athlete (wrestler/boxer) requiring calorie and macro control while maintaining performance and meeting hydration guidelines
